raw_consumer_statement:
XXXX XXXX XXXX Phone : XXXX Email : XXXX Date : XX/XX/year> Citi XXXX  XXXX XXXX XXXX. XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, SD XXXX Subject : Formal Fraud Dispute Unauthorized Balance of {$4500.00} To Whom It XXXX Concern, I am writing to formally dispute and demand correction regarding fraudulent charges on my Citi XXXX XXXX  account. 

On XX/XX/year>, I contacted Citi to report fraudulent activity and dispute unauthorized charges totaling approximately {$4500.00}. Citi credited only {$600.00}, and the remaining balance was improperly carried over to a newly issued card. This is unacceptable and does not resolve the dispute. 

Please note the following facts : Prior to my incapacitation of approximately XXXX and a XXXX  years, my account reflected a XXXX balance. 
During that time, the account showed no usage, no activity, and no authorized users. 
I did not authorize or benefit from any of the disputed charges. 
I have since placed XXXX  on all XXXX  major credit bureaus XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX 

I am requesting the following corrective actions : XXXX. The entire {$4500.00} balance be removed and my account restored to a XXXX balance. 
XXXX. Issuance of a new credit card unconnected to the disputed balance. 
XXXX. A written apology and a clear explanation of how this matter was mishandled, including where Citi failed to properly address my fraud dispute. 

If this matter is not fully resolved within XXXX days of receipt, I will have no choice but to escalate this complaint to the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau ( CFPB ), the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency ( XXXX ), and my State Attorney Generals Office for immediate review. 

I expect written confirmation once these corrective actions have been completed. 

Sincerely, XXXX XXXX XXXX
